source_note: Cayron natural OR: (010)B19′//(110)B2 and [101]B19′//[111]B2. Replace lattice constants with measured sample values for exact work.
recommended_next_experiments: Run DSC to measure Ms/Mf/As/Af and hysteresis.
Measure lattice parameters and retained/parent phase fractions by XRD/synchrotron.
Build or measure thermal history; start with Rosenthal/FE thermal model if sensors are absent.
